title: Look Behind
description: A simple client-side mod that allows the player to quickly look behind while still moving forward, just by pressing a key.
body:
# Look Behind
This is just a simple client-side mod that allows the player to quickly look behind while still moving forward, just by pressing a key (Default R, configurable in MC Settings).
Useful when you are being chased.  

![Look Behind demo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/R4z0rX/LookBehind/refs/heads/master/LookBehind.gif)
